label: Projectile properties
description: Properties for projectile things covering speed, damage, arc, explosion, stopping power, and spawn behavior on impact.

speed.label: Speed
speed.description: Movement speed in cells per second.

damageDef.label: Damage def
damageDef.description: DamageDef applied on impact. Private in source but used in shipped XML.

damageAmountBase.label: Damage amount base
damageAmountBase.description: Base damage on impact. Private in source but used in shipped XML.

armorPenetrationBase.label: Armor penetration base
armorPenetrationBase.description: Base armor penetration (0–1). Private in source but used in shipped XML.

stoppingPower.label: Stopping power
stoppingPower.description: How strongly this projectile staggers or stops moving targets on hit.

flyOverhead.label: Fly overhead
flyOverhead.description: If true, this projectile arcs over obstacles and cannot be blocked by cover.

arcHeightFactor.label: Arc height factor
arcHeightFactor.description: Height of the parabolic arc as a fraction of range. Used when flyOverhead is true.

shadowSize.label: Shadow size
shadowSize.description: Scale of the shadow drawn beneath this projectile during flight.

explosionRadius.label: Explosion radius
explosionRadius.description: Radius of the explosion on impact. 0 means no explosion.

explosionDamageFactor.label: Explosion damage factor
explosionDamageFactor.description: Multiplier applied to all explosion damage.

screenShakeFactor.label: Screen shake factor
screenShakeFactor.description: Multiplier on camera shake intensity caused by this projectile's explosion.

ai_IsIncendiary.label: AI: is incendiary
ai_IsIncendiary.description: Hint to the AI that this projectile sets things on fire.

ai_NeverAvoidsThis.label: AI: never avoids this
ai_NeverAvoidsThis.description: If true, the AI will not dodge out of the way of this projectile.

applyDamageToExplosionCellsNeighbors.label: Apply damage to explosion cell neighbors
applyDamageToExplosionCellsNeighbors.description: Whether cells adjacent to the explosion center also receive damage.

explosionSpeedFactor.label: Explosion speed factor
explosionSpeedFactor.description: Multiplier on the radial expansion speed of the explosion visual effect.

preExplosionSpawnDef.label: Pre-explosion spawn def
preExplosionSpawnDef.description: ThingDef spawned at the impact point before the explosion detonates.

preExplosionSpawnChance.label: Pre-explosion spawn chance
preExplosionSpawnChance.description: Probability (0–1) that the pre-explosion spawn actually occurs.

postExplosionSpawnDef.label: Post-explosion spawn def
postExplosionSpawnDef.description: ThingDef scattered in the explosion radius after detonation.

postExplosionSpawnChance.label: Post-explosion spawn chance
postExplosionSpawnChance.description: Probability (0–1) that each explosion cell spawns a post-explosion thing.

postExplosionSpawnThingCount.label: Post-explosion spawn thing count
postExplosionSpawnThingCount.description: Count of post-explosion things spawned per cell.

extraDamages.label: Extra damages
extraDamages.description: Additional damage instances applied alongside the primary impact damage.

soundHitThickRoof.label: Sound hit thick roof
soundHitThickRoof.description: SoundDef played when this projectile strikes a thick roof (e.g. mountain).

soundExplode.label: Sound explode
soundExplode.description: SoundDef played when this projectile explodes.

soundImpactDefault.label: Sound impact default
soundImpactDefault.description: Default SoundDef played on impact when no terrain-specific sound applies.

soundAmbient.label: Sound ambient
soundAmbient.description: SoundDef looped while this projectile is in flight.

explosionColorCenter.label: Explosion color center
explosionColorCenter.description: RGBA color at the center of the explosion visual.

explosionColorEdge.label: Explosion color edge
explosionColorEdge.description: RGBA color at the outer edge of the explosion visual.

explosionEffect.label: Explosion effect
explosionEffect.description: EffecterDef played at the explosion center on detonation.
